session_summary: Batch fixed all 6 camera domain beads: parallax formula, null refs, boss detection, SmoothDamp, standards
done: ParallaxLayer: Replaced inverted linear parallax formula with asymptotic curve 1/(1+depth*0.05)
CameraBoundsTrigger: Moved Camera.main from Awake to Start with null check, cached Collider2D in Awake
BossRoomTrigger: Added activeInHierarchy check + BossController event subscription for boss defeat
AdvancedCameraController: Replaced Lerp with SmoothDamp for room lock, added velocity reset
AdvancedCameraController: Added null check + LogError for Camera component
All 5 camera scripts: Added explicit private to all SerializeField fields
ParallaxBackgroundManager: Changed public Layer[] to [SerializeField] private
decisions: Used 0.05 divisor for parallax curve — gives good spread from depth 5 (0.80) to depth 50 (0.29)
Used 1/roomLockSpeed as SmoothDamp time to preserve existing speed semantics (higher = faster)
BossRoomTrigger: Hook added BossController event subscription with polling as fallback for bosses without BossController
next_steps: Playtest parallax at various Z depths to verify visual spread
Playtest boss room lock/unlock with both Destroy and SetActive(false) patterns
Verify camera bounds triggers work when MainCamera loads after scene start
